decision_rationale: A timestamp-safe real-data performance evaluator is not immediately feasible in current qfa because the repository data/backtest path is OHLCV/Alpaca/CSV-oriented and has no native crypto perp funding, OI, mark/index price, funding-cashflow, venue metadata, or fee/fill accounting. Public API research found OKX endpoints accessible from this host for funding history, OI-related data and candles, but Binance and Bybit public derivative endpoints were geo-blocked from this host and vendor sources require credentials/licensing. This should be treated as an infrastructure/data-ingestion blocker, not as alpha evidence.

minimum_needed_before_performance: Exchange/vendor connector for funding-rate history with exact funding timestamps and publication/availability lag policy.
Historical open-interest series aligned to contract identifiers and timestamps without future fill.
Mark/index/last price candles or trades aligned to the same contract universe.
Contract metadata, delisting/symbol-change handling, settlement/funding interval handling and stable universe construction.
Evaluator that decomposes mark/price PnL from funding cashflow PnL and applies maker/taker/slippage/fill-mix assumptions.

source_options_checked.evidence: HTTP 200 shape checks for funding-rate-history, open-interest, history mark/index/trade candles and rubik open-interest-volume endpoints; raw payloads not retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Promising primary public source, but needs pagination, lag rules, schema normalization and coverage tests before any evaluator.

source_options_checked.evidence: Funding and OI endpoints returned HTTP 451 restricted-location response during scout.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Could be useful from an authorized location, but cannot be assumed available for this infrastructure.

source_options_checked.evidence: Funding and OI endpoints returned HTTP 403 CloudFront country block during scout.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Could be useful from an authorized location, but cannot be assumed available for this infrastructure.

source_options_checked.evidence: Instruments/tickers endpoint shape checks succeeded; historical funding/OI coverage was not proven in this dependency-light scout.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Potential supplement only after endpoint-level coverage proof.

source_options_checked.evidence: No credentials or vendor dumps used; no raw data retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: May solve coverage and survivorship issues if licensed with documented point-in-time fields.
